description.value: Where others feel their way through a weave instinctively, you perceive the underlying structure of every effect you produce, and every effect aimed at you.

system.benefits: When you are targeted by a weave, you automatically identify the energy types being used and the general effect category (damage, control, transformation, etc.) before the effect resolves. Subtract 1 from one targeting die result of your choice when making Arcana checks to identify magical effects or objects.
